description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has three jobs: build, test, and release. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt 5.15.2 and dependencies, sets up kColorPicker and kImageAnnotator, builds the project, and uploads the build artifacts. The test job depends on build, downloads the artifacts, and the release job depends on build and creates an automatic release.
